assertions.description: The popover IDL attribute supports the 'hint' value, representing the new stacking category.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); e.popover = 'hint'; return e.popover === 'hint'; })()

assertions.description: The popover IDL attribute continues to support the 'auto' value.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); e.popover = 'auto'; return e.popover === 'auto'; })()

assertions.description: The popover IDL attribute continues to support the 'manual' value.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); e.popover = 'manual'; return e.popover === 'manual'; })()

assertions.description: A popover=hint can be toggled via showPopover and hidePopover.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); e.popover = 'hint'; document.body.appendChild(e); try { e.showPopover(); const open = e.matches(':popover-open'); e.hidePopover(); return open; } finally { e.remove(); } })()

assertions.description: Opening a popover=hint does not force-dismiss an already-open unrelated popover=auto; both remain :popover-open.
assertions.test: (() => { const hint = document.createElement('div'); const auto = document.createElement('div'); hint.popover = 'hint'; auto.popover = 'auto'; document.body.append(hint, auto); try { auto.showPopover(); hint.showPopover(); return hint.matches(':popover-open') && auto.matches(':popover-open'); } catch (_) { return false; } finally { if (hint.matches(':popover-open')) hint.hidePopover(); if (auto.matches(':popover-open')) auto.hidePopover(); hint.remove(); auto.remove(); } })()

assertions.description: Opening a new unrelated popover=auto force-hides an already-open popover=hint.
assertions.test: (() => { const hint = document.createElement('div'); const auto = document.createElement('div'); hint.popover = 'hint'; auto.popover = 'auto'; document.body.append(hint, auto); try { hint.showPopover(); auto.showPopover(); return auto.matches(':popover-open') && !hint.matches(':popover-open'); } catch (_) { return false; } finally { if (auto.matches(':popover-open')) auto.hidePopover(); if (hint.matches(':popover-open')) hint.hidePopover(); hint.remove(); auto.remove(); } })()
